data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. SCANDALIZE reunites with Jason Holder after scoring an easy win over 1522m at this track last time out after racing on the speed into the turn. Has been in solid form this prep and on best form can repeat the dose. 1. THE SHAPER scored an easy win over 1400m at Wagga last start after racing in behind the speed into the turn. Jumping from an inside draw and over 200m more in distance is a main danger. ROPICAL HOUSE (15) resumes from a spell following a last start second of 11 over 1600m at this track. Well worth an each-way chance. 10. BRAVE STAR looked well in need of his two resuming runs this prep. Trained here and in a fitter state can finish in the money.","runners":[8,1,10],"exclusive":true}
